title: Assistant Store Manager - Amazon Books India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Amazon Books India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Amazon Books India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Amazon Books India:
Amazon Books India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India!
